name: Memphis City Employees Credit Union (Mt. Moriah)
description_short: Member-owned credit union serving City of Memphis employees and affiliated organizations since 1959, offering checking, savings, loans, and CDs with competitive rates.
description_long:
Memphis City Employees Credit Union (MCECU) was established in 1959 and has grown to serve over 44,000 members. It operates as a member-owned, not-for-profit cooperative with an elected board of unpaid volunteers from the general membership. The credit union is headquartered in Memphis, Tennessee, and serves employees of the City of Memphis, City of Bartlett, Airport Authority, Memphis & Shelby County Library, MLGW, Smith & Nephew, IRS Service Center Memphis, and MCR Safety, plus their families and retirees.

MCECU offers a comprehensive range of personal banking services including checking and savings accounts, certificates of deposit (CDs), auto loans, personal loans, and a mobile banking app. They feature competitive auto loan rates (3.99% APR for 60 months, 4.49% for 72 months, 5.29% for 84 months) and special CD offerings (currently 4.50% APY on 11-month CDs with $1,000-$50,000 deposit limits). The credit union also provides a "No-Credit Check Loan" option year-round, digital banking tools, and access to SavvyMoney credit score tracking for members.

As a credit union rather than a traditional bank, MCECU's member-owned structure means profits are returned to members rather than shareholders. Their membership is restricted to specific employer groups, creating a defined community of members. They emphasize member service and relationship-based lending, as evidenced by customer testimonials highlighting personalized service and fraud protection.

However, membership eligibility is highly restrictive—limited to employees of specific Memphis-area employers and their families. The credit union's service area and branch network appear limited to the Memphis region. While they offer competitive rates on loans and CDs, these are promotional rates subject to credit approval and other restrictions. Limited information is provided on their website regarding fees, account minimums beyond CD products, or comprehensive product comparisons. Many banks offer installment loans with fixed monthly payments, giving borrowers a clear payoff timeline.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Restricted membership model creates a tight-knit community with personalized service—44,000 members since 1959
Competitive auto loan rates during promotional periods (3.99% APR for 60 months on new/used vehicles)
Special 11-month CD rate of 4.50% APY with low $1,000 minimum deposit
No-Credit Check Loan option available year-round for members who may not qualify for traditional credit
Member-owned, not-for-profit structure means profits return to members, not external shareholders
Mobile app available on both iOS and Android for digital banking convenience
SavvyMoney credit score access included for members to monitor financial health
cons: Membership is highly restricted to employees of specific Memphis-area employers only—not open to the general public
Auto loan rates and CD rates are promotional and subject to credit approval; actual rates vary by credit score and other factors
Limited service area—Memphis-based credit union with no indication of nationwide services or branch network expansion
Website provides limited information on account fees, minimum balances, or full product details needed for comparison shopping
No mention of business banking, investment services, or advanced financial products beyond basic personal banking
best_for: City of Memphis employees and their families seeking member-owned banking with personalized service
Employees of MLGW, Smith & Nephew, Airport Authority, and other affiliated organizations looking for competitive loan rates
Individuals with limited credit history or no-credit situations interested in the No-Credit Check Loan product
Savers seeking competitive CD rates with low deposit minimums ($1,000 minimum on 11-month CDs)
diagnosis: Memphis City Employees Credit Union is best for employees of specific Memphis-area employers and their families who value member-owned banking with personalized service and competitive rates. The main caveat is membership eligibility is strictly limited to employees of designated organizations—this is not a credit union open to the general public, making it inaccessible for most consumers.
services: Branch locations and ATM network access
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
